   "reasoning": "Given the latest funding cut, we need a clear paper trail to justify our actions. A transparency report at maximum intensity will help us showcase our efforts. The attendance mandate is a low-risk, high-return intervention that aligns with existing regulations. We should also inject emergency funds to address the immediate crisis. Student scholarships will help mitigate the dropout risk. Free-form counseling programs without a curriculum concern me, so I've set that to zero. And, honestly, I'm not convinced that hiring more staff will solve our problems without the right oversight.",
